returning.junior: Welcome back — pick up where you left off or try a new case.
returning.mid: Welcome back. Your tone and progress are saved locally.
returning.staff: Welcome back. Skip to demos or takeaways if you already know the pattern.

progress1.junior: You finished a case — nice. Want to try another in the same track?
progress1.mid: One case down. Pattern memory beats one-off reading.
progress1.staff: First completion logged. Takeaway chapters are the retention anchor.

progress5.junior: Five cases — you're building real muscle memory now.
progress5.mid: Five cases complete. You're past tourist mode.
progress5.staff: Five completions. Time to cross-link patterns in the library.

filterMatch.staff: {n} live case{nLabel} — filter is doing its job.

filterEmpty.junior: Nothing matches — try clearing the filter.
filterEmpty.mid: No cases match that track. Clear filter or show upcoming.
filterEmpty.staff: Zero matches. Widen the filter or enable upcoming cases.

toneSwitch.junior: Going deeper — I'll skip some basics.
toneSwitch.mid: Tone updated — hints and voice match your level now.
toneSwitch.staff: Staff mode — trade-offs and production notes ahead.

completed.junior: You reached the takeaway — that's what to remember. Skim the reading library for a war story on this pattern.
completed.mid: Case complete. The takeaway is your shipping checklist — pair it with an article in the library.
completed.staff: Takeaway logged. Measure in RUM what you validated in the demo; cross-check the library for post-mortems.

demoIdle.junior: Still there? Tap Broken, then Fixed — feel the difference.
demoIdle.mid: Demo idle — toggle broken vs fixed and watch layout stability.
demoIdle.staff: 30s on demo — attribute perceived wait vs actual TTFB.

toneSwitch.junior: New tone — I'll explain things at this level now.
toneSwitch.mid: Tone switched — scroll back if you want the other depth.
toneSwitch.staff: Staff depth — skipping hand-holding on fundamentals.

firstVisit.junior: 900+ war stories catalogued — filter by company or topic.
firstVisit.mid: External reading library — pair with cases for pattern + war story.
firstVisit.staff: Curated links for post-mortems and benchmarks — not a replacement for demos.

filtered.junior: Filtered — open a link that matches what you just read.
filtered.mid: Filter active — skim titles before deep-reading one article.
filtered.staff: Narrowed list — prefer primary sources in the summary column.

once.junior: I'm Casey — switch Junior → Staff inside any case to see me grow up.
once.mid: Casey here. Tone changes my depth, not just labels.
once.staff: Casey in Staff mode surfaces production gotchas and measurement notes.

mini.junior: Pick a company you admire — then find a case that uses their patterns.
mini.mid: Company index — cross-reference with interactive cases on the hub.
mini.staff: Org context first; patterns in cases are vendor-agnostic.

firstCaseCompleted.junior: First case done — proud of you.
firstCaseCompleted.mid: First completion — keep the takeaway in your PR checklist.
firstCaseCompleted.staff: First case completed — log the pattern in your team wiki.

fiveCases.mid: Five cases — you're in the top cohort of readers.
fiveCases.staff: Five cases — time to teach this pattern to someone else.
